title: epiprinus balansae
intro: Epiprinus balansae, also known as the Balansa's orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. Epiprinus balansae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health ailments.
